use_cases: Displaying KPI metrics and progress indicators on analytics dashboards
Visualizing performance metrics with configurable thresholds and color coding
Creating multi-ring comparison gauges for business analytics
Showing completion percentages with animated transitions
ai_summary: A configurable circular gauge component for displaying metrics and percentages with smooth spring animations via Framer Motion. Supports multiple rings, threshold-based coloring, gradient fills, glow effects, and various gauge types (full/half/quarter). Designed for dashboard visualizations in SaaS, fintech, and data analytics applications.
